ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_use_types" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Name of the land use type (e.g., Cropland) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the land use type (e.g., arable, perennial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the land use type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the land use type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate zone (e.g., Cool Temperate Dry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate zone */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the climate zone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the climate zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the climate zone was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the climate zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of factor (e.g., F_LU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the factor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land use type */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor being assessed */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the factor (e.g., Long term cultivated) */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate zone */,
  "value" REAL /* Value associated with the factor, level, and climate zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data entry was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, sensor) */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_use_types ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES climate_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data share */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_projects table */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the agricultural_data table */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_projects table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
